prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约2136名，2024年降至3384名，2025年进一步后移至3682名，近三年累计后移约1546名，呈持续后移趋势；2025年基准位次约3682名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年54人、2024年55人、2025年61人，2026年计划58人，较2025年减少3人，小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第22名，近年排名稳定在第21-22名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要 关联2019年学伴活动遗留舆情；抖音热度排名第20（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度较高；历史投档异常方面，2022年陕西断档、2023年新闻传播专业位次大幅下滑、 2024年四川理科调档线下降63分等信号，对报考心理有一定滞后影响；数学A+（王牌学科）、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义 理论A等，A-及以上学科共19个，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业2026年均为高热推荐 ，与山大优势工科方向匹配；新疆2026年普通高考总人数约23.8万人（较2025年约7.65万人大幅增长），按历史比例估算理科考生约16.3万人，竞争显著加剧；山东大学位于山东省，对新疆考生属跨省招生，无本省地域偏好优势；该校在新疆招生占比极小（2025年约0.015），地域因素对报考决策 影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年理科考生规模大幅增长（竞争加剧）、招生计划小幅缩招（缓和竞争）及声誉偏负面等多重因素，在2025年基准 3682名基础上，考生规模激增是主导因素，预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约3693名，区间3324-4062名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 2136, dropping to 3384 in 2024, and further shifting to 3682 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1546 over the past three years, showing a continuous backward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3682; the university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang for science was 54 in 2023, 55 in 2024, 61 in 2025, and 58 in 2026, a decrease of 3 compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 22nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 21st-22nd range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly related to the lingering public opinion from the 2019 buddy program incident; Douyin popularity ranking 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting relatively high attention from applicants; historical admission anomalies include a break in Shaanxi in 2022, a significant drop in the ranking of the Journalism and Communication major in 2023, and a 63-point drop in the science admission line in Sichuan in 2024, which have a lagging impact on application psychology; Mathematics A+ (flagship discipline), Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, etc., with a total of 19 A- and above disciplines, strong disciplinary strength, providing strong attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other science and engineering majors are all highly recommended in 2026, matching Shandong University's advantageous engineering directions; the total number of general college entrance examination students in Xinjiang in 2026 is about 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), with an estimated 163,000 science students based on historical proportions, significantly intensifying competition; Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, which is an inter-provincial enrollment for Xinjiang students, with no local regional preference advantage; the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is very small (about 0.015 in 2025), so regional factors have limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in the number of science students in 2026 (intensified competition), the slight reduction in enrollment plan (easing competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 3682, the surge in student numbers is the dominant factor, and the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3693, with a range of 3324-4062.

- Computer Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Energy and Power)
- Automation
- Mechanical Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Civil Engineering (Civil, Water Resources, and Ocean Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Intelligent Construction and Smart Transportation
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3324-4062, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Automation, Energy and Power), with Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Civil Engineering, Environmental Science) as safety options. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, prioritize reaching for Mathematics (Shandong University's flagship A+ discipline) and Clinical Medicine.
